hooks.command:
{ printf '## MDS Vault (auto-loaded for every prompt)

'; printf 'The full vault lives at packages/mds-agents/mds-vault/. The README (navigation map) and _meta/vault-rules.md are below; read the relevant atom file from packages/mds-agents/mds-vault/<folder>/<file>.md for any specific topic per CLAUDE.md Step 1.

---

'; cat packages/mds-agents/mds-vault/README.md; printf '

---

'; cat packages/mds-agents/mds-vault/_meta/vault-rules.md; } | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "UserPromptSubmit", additionalContext: .}}'
